paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.58 as of July 22, 2026, with a change of -1.05% from the prior close and -24.28% over the last 21 sessions.

There are no new news headlines in the last 24 hours, but recent news includes an announcement from Fermi Inc. regarding its second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, which is scheduled for August 13, 2026.

Recent SEC filings from Fermi Inc. include an 8-K/A form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson, an 8-K form announcing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and other filings related to the company's financing activities and governance. There is also one Form 4 filing in the feed.
